org.apache.juneau.commons.conversion.Conversion

Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.commons.conversion
Type conversion utilities for converting between different object types.
org.apache.juneau.marshall
Marshalling API

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected <I, O> Conversion<I,O>
    BasicConverter.findConversion(Class<I> inType, Class<O> outType)
     
    protected abstract <I, O> Conversion<I,O>
    CachingConverter.findConversion(Class<I> inType, Class<O> outType)
    Finds a conversion function from the specified input type to the specified output type.
    protected <I, O> Conversion<I,O>
    ConfigurableConverter.findConversion(Class<I> inType, Class<O> outType)
     
    Conversion<?,?>
    ConversionFinder.findConversion(Class<?> inType, Class<?> outType)
    Returns a Conversion for the specified input/output type pair, or null if this finder has no conversion for the pair.

  • Uses of Conversion in org.apache.juneau.marshall

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall that return Conversion
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Conversion<?,?>
    MarshallingContext.findConversion(Class<?> inType, Class<?> outType)
    Implements ConversionFinder to provide all MarshallingContext-specific type conversions that cannot be expressed in BasicConverter (which has no dependency on juneau-marshall).
